logging-spring-tests/src/main/java/com/g.general_idea: Explicitly name the request parameter in @RequestParam annotation for clarity.
Specify the consumed media type for the POST endpoint to ensure correct form handling.
Add a new endpoint to handle multipart file uploads.

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Integrate MemoryAppender into tests to verify that the SpringLoggingFilter correctly logs request and response details.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: Added @BeforeEach setup for MemoryAppender and assertions like assertEquals(2, memoryAppender.getSize()) in existing tests.

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Update postByIdReqParam test to use HttpEntity with form-encoded headers instead of passing null body, ensuring correct HTTP semantics.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: Replaced restTemplate.postForObject with restTemplate.exchange using HttpHeaders and LinkedMultiValueMap.

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Add a new test case to verify logging behavior for multipart file upload requests.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: Added postMultipart test method and getTestFile helper to create and send a temporary file.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Introduce a configurable flag to allow users to disable logging of request/response payloads.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Added 'private boolean ignorePayload = false;' field and corresponding getter/setter, passing it to SpringLoggingFilter constructor.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Extract request and response logging logic into a dedicated LoggingPrinter class to improve code structure and maintainability.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Replaced inline LOGGER.info calls with loggingPrinter.printRequest() and loggingPrinter.printResponse() methods.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Remove the unused import of org.apache.commons.io.IOUtils as its functionality is now handled by the new LoggingPrinter.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Removed 'import org.apache.commons.io.IOUtils;' from the imports list.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Clean up unused imports related to the refactored logging logic.
Add a new 'ignorePayload' parameter to the constructor to allow controlling whether request/response payloads are logged.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Added 'boolean ignorePayload' to the SpringLoggingFilter constructor signature and passed it to the LoggingPrinter builder.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Remove the 'logHeaders' field as its state is now managed within the LoggingPrinter instance.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Removed 'private boolean logHeaders;' field and its assignment in the constructor.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Remove unused variable assignment in getHandlerMethod that was no longer needed after refactoring.
Remove the explicit clearing of the MDC context at the start of request processing to preserve existing context or rely on other cleanup mechanisms.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Removed the line `MDC.clear();` from the `generateAndSetMDC` method.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Cache the request parameter map in the constructor to ensure it remains accessible after the input stream is consumed.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Added `private Map<String, String[]> parameterMap;` field, initialized it in constructor via `request.getParameterMap()`, and overrode `getParameterMap()` to return the cached value.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Modify body extraction logic to use the query string bytes if available, falling back to the input stream only for non-GET requests.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Added check `if (query != null) { body = query.getBytes(); }` before attempting to read from `request.getInputStream()`.

reactive-logging-spring-tests/src/main/j.general_idea: Add a new GET endpoint to handle request parameters for testing purposes.
Add a new POST endpoint consuming form-urlencoded data to handle request parameters for testing purposes.
reactive-logging-spring-tests/src/main/j.human_impl: @PostMapping(value = "/req-param", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED_VALUE) public Mono<String> postWithIdRequest(@RequestParam("id") Integer id)

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Enhance request logging to include query parameters in the log output for better traceability.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Added `exchange.getRequest().getQueryParams().toSingleValueMap()` to the LOGGER.info calls for requests.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Reformat code indentation and spacing to adhere to project style guidelines.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Changed indentation from tabs to spaces and adjusted spacing around operators and braces.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Correct a bug where the correlation ID was incorrectly stored under the request ID header name in the MDC context.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Changed MDC.put(requestIdHeaderName, ...) to MDC.put(correlationIdHeaderName, ...) for correlation IDs.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Remove the explicit MDC.clear() call at the start of the method, likely relying on lifecycle management elsewhere.
